qa.question: When did Caroline go to the LGBTQ support group?
What fields would Caroline be likely to pursue in her education?
What hobby did Melanie take up after the camping trip?
What question has no supporting evidence at all?
Adversarial: when did Melanie attend the LGBTQ support group?

session_1.speaker: Caroline
session_1.text: Hey Mel! Good to see you again.

session_1.speaker: Melanie
session_1.text: Hey Caroline! It has been a while. What have you been up to?

session_1.speaker: Caroline
session_1.text: Yesterday I went to my LGBTQ support group. It was on 7 May 2023 and it was really meaningful.

session_1.speaker: Melanie
session_1.text: That sounds wonderful. I am really glad you found that community.

session_1.speaker: Caroline
session_1.text: Me too. It has helped me think about going back to school.

session_1.speaker: Caroline
session_1.text: I have been thinking about psychology, and eventually a counseling certification.

session_2.speaker: Melanie
session_2.text: Caroline, how is the school research going?

session_2.speaker: Caroline
session_2.text: Good. I even looked at programs this week.

session_2.speaker: Caroline
session_2.text: I am leaning towards counseling certification so I can work with LGBTQ youth directly.

session_2.speaker: Melanie
session_2.text: That is a wonderful direction. We should plan our next camping trip soon.

session_3.speaker: Melanie
session_3.text: Camping last weekend was great. I loved the lake.

session_3.speaker: Melanie
session_3.text: I picked up pottery this week because of it. The stillness of camping inspired me.

session_3.speaker: Caroline
session_3.text: Pottery! That suits you. I should come see your first pieces.
